calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Vacated

Motion To Compel Compliance With The Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEXANDRA C. SEIBERT, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington LLP (Tel: 415-288-9800) for defendant the Regents of the University of California;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Compliance With The Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Defense counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the opposing side for approval as to the form, and then submit the proposed order to the pro tem judge at rkane1089@aol.com. The proposed order should leave blank the amount of sanctions to be awarded.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-13-2021 Set For Trial On Mar-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-13-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Set For Trial On Sep-26-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
